aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic level of AEO readiness with some foundational elements in place, such as schema markup and localized contact information. However, there are significant gaps in online reputation and content depth.
quick_wins: Encourage customers to leave Google reviews to build a reputation and improve visibility.
Expand website content to include detailed service descriptions, customer testimonials, and a blog with relevant industry topics.
Optimize meta tags and headers with targeted keywords related to AC repair and maintenance in Miami.

gbp_analysis.summary: The business has some localized elements, such as phone numbers and a Miami location, but lacks a comprehensive Google Business Profile (GBP). This is a critical issue as it directly impacts local search visibility.
critical_issues: Lack of local keywords and content targeting Miami and surrounding areas.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone) information on its website, but there is no evidence of widespread citations across local directories and platforms.
action_items: Create and verify a Google Business Profile with accurate NAP information.
Submit the business to relevant local directories and citation sites, such as Yelp, Yellow Pages, and local chamber of commerce websites.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and directories.

schema_gaps: No LocalBusiness schema with detailed address and service area information
No Product or Service schema for specific HVAC services offered

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of online reputation and customer reviews
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for AC repair services in Miami on Google
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a strategy to generate customer reviews and testimonials
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, informative content that establishes the business as an industry expert, such as blog posts, how-to guides, and video tutorials on HVAC maintenance and repair.

page_title: Miami AC Repair Service | Cool Solution Services
